bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid. The opponent’s opening offer gives me low utility and shows no concession pattern yet, so I will counter with my strongest values across all issues.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a near-maximal utility bid while making only a tiny concession to avoid simply repeating my previous offer. The opponent’s two offers are both very low utility for me and their second offer is not an improvement, so there is no evidence yet that they are conceding toward my priorities.

I am still targeting a very high-utility bid because it is only t=0.04, and the opponent’s offers remain far from acceptable despite a small concession on issueC. Since issueD has low importance to me and the opponent has varied it, I am making a limited concession there while holding firm on my high-weight issues.

At t=0.06 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only a small concession on a low-weight issue. The opponent has repeatedly offered valueE across most issues and has not shown meaningful concession toward my preferences, so I will hold firm on my highest-weight issues while testing valueE on issueE as a possible tradeoff.

At t=0.08 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making a small concession on a low-weight issue. The opponent’s valid offers remain very low utility for me and show little real concession, but they consistently request valueE on issueD/issueE, so I concede issueD while holding firm on my most important issues.

I am targeting a high-utility bid because it is still very early at t=0.10 and the opponent’s offers remain low-value to me with only minimal concession. I am holding firm on my most important issues A, B, and C, while making a small concession on lower-weight issueD to avoid simply repeating my prior bids.

I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.855 because it is still early (t=0.12) and the opponent has not meaningfully conceded—their offers remain clustered around low-value outcomes for me. I am making only a small concession on the lower-weight issueD while holding firm on the most important issues issueA, issueB, and issueC.

At t=0.14 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid for myself while making concessions mainly on lower-weight issues. The opponent’s offers remain clustered around valueE and have not materially improved for me, suggesting they may strongly prefer valueE; I will keep my high-weight issues A, B, and C at top values while conceding issueD and issueE toward their pattern.

At t=0.16 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making concessions only on lower-weight issues. The opponent has repeatedly pushed issueA/issueB/issueE toward valueE and has not meaningfully improved offers to me, so I will hold firm on my most important issues A, B, and C while varying a low-weight issue to avoid simply repeating my last bid.

At t=0.18 it is still early, so I am keeping my highest-weight issues A, B, and C at strong values while making concessions on lower-weight issues D and E. The opponent has repeatedly offered very low-utility bids for me and has not clearly conceded, so I am not making a major concession yet, but I am avoiding an exact repeat of my prior bid.

I am targeting a high-utility bid because it is still early at t=0.20 and the opponent’s offers remain very low for my preferences, with little meaningful concession toward my high-weight issues. I am conceding on lower-weight issues D and E by offering valueE, which the opponent repeatedly proposes, while holding firm on my most important issues A, B, and C.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.68 while making a meaningful concession on lower/medium-priority issues to test for movement. The opponent has held firm near very low-utility offers for me, repeatedly favoring valueE and sometimes valueD on issueC, so at t=0.22 I will keep my highest-weight issues issueA and issueB at my best values but concede issueC/issueD/issueE toward patterns they have signaled.

At t=0.24 it is still early, so I am targeting a relatively high utility while making concessions mainly on lower-weight issues and the moderately flexible issueC. The opponent has repeatedly offered issueB:valueE and issueE:valueE with little overall concession, so I will hold firm on my high-weight issueA and issueB while giving movement on issueC/issueE and a modest concession on issueD.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.68 by holding firm on my highest-weight issues A and B while conceding on lower-weight D and E and partially on C. At t=0.26 there is some pressure to make a credible tradeoff, but the opponent’s offers remain very low for me and mostly unchanged, so I should not concede on the core issues yet. Their repeated use of valueE and occasional issueC:valueD suggests valueD on C and valueE on D/E may be more acceptable to them.

At t=0.28, I am targeting a still-positive but more conciliatory bid around 0.67 weighted utility, since the opponent has not meaningfully improved their offers to me. Their bids consistently push issueB to valueE and issueA to valueD/valueE, which are costly for me, so I hold firm on issueA and issueB while conceding on lower-weight issues and offering issueC=valueD, which they have sometimes proposed.

At t=0.30 I am still targeting a moderately high utility bid while making a meaningful concession on lower/mid-priority issues, since the opponent has remained firm around issueB=valueE and issueC/issueD/issueE=valueE. Their offers are still very low for me and show little real concession, so I am holding my most important issueA and issueB at my best values while moving issueC, issueD, and issueE toward values they have repeatedly signaled.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.70, since it is only t=0.32 and the opponent’s offers remain very low and mostly static from my perspective. I concede on lower-priority issueE and make a meaningful concession on issueC, while holding firm on my highest-value issueA and issueB because the opponent has not shown real movement or provided credible messages.

I am targeting a still-strong utility around 0.68, conceding mainly on lower-weight issues and partially on issueC while holding firm on the high-weight issueA and issueB. At t=0.34 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept the opponent’s very low-utility pattern; their offers are mostly static around issueA/valueD-or-E, issueB/valueE, and issueE/valueE, with no natural-language messages to justify further concession.

I am targeting a utility around 0.67: still protecting my highest-weight issues issueA and issueB, while conceding on lower-weight issueD and issueE and partially on issueC. At t=0.36 there is some time pressure but not enough to accept the opponent’s very low-utility pattern, and their offers show little real concession, mostly staying around valueD/valueE combinations.

At t=0.38 I am targeting a still-solid utility around 0.68 while conceding mainly on lower-weight issues and preserving my high-value positions on issueA and issueB. The opponent has been very firm around issueB:valueE and issueE:valueE, with occasional issueC:valueD, so I am matching them on issueC/valueD and the lower-weight issueD/issueE positions while not accepting their very low-utility core demands.

At t=0.40 I am targeting a moderate concession bid around 0.64 utility, since it is mid-negotiation but not yet late enough to give up my highest-weight issues. The opponent has held firm around valueE/valueD-heavy bids with little concession, so I am conceding on issueC, issueD, and issueE while holding issueA and issueB at my top values because they carry the most value for me.

At t=0.42 I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.63 while still protecting my highest-weight issues, issueA and issueB. The opponent has remained anchored on valueE/valueD offers that are very low for me, so I concede mainly on lower-weight issues and on issueC rather than giving up issueA or issueB.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.68 by holding firm on my highest-weight issues, issueA and issueB, while conceding on lower-weight issueD and issueE. The opponent has stayed very firm around valueE/valueD-heavy bids with only small movement on issueC, so I am offering issueC: valueD as a compromise they have repeatedly signaled while avoiding further large concessions before the deadline pressure is stronger.

I am targeting a mid-game concession around 0.64 utility for me, preserving my strongest issues issueA and issueB while conceding more on issueC, issueD, and issueE. The opponent has stayed very firm around valueE/valueD-heavy bids with little meaningful concession, so at t=0.46 I should improve acceptability without giving up my highest-weight positions yet.

At t=0.48, I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.68: conceding on lower-weight issues D and E and partially on issueC, while holding firm on my highest-value issueA and important issueB. The opponent’s offers remain very low for me and show little real concession, so I should not move toward their full pattern yet, but I can keep signaling flexibility on the issues I have already been conceding.

I am targeting a moderate mid-game utility around 0.63, conceding on issueC, issueD, and issueE while holding firm on the high-importance issueA and issueB. The opponent has stayed clustered around valueE/valueD bids with little real concession, and there are no messages to change that assessment, so at t=0.50 I will not drop my most important issues yet.

I am targeting a mid-game utility around 0.56, conceding more than my earlier bids but still protecting my highest-weight issueA. The opponent has consistently pushed valueE/valueD across issues and has not meaningfully improved the utility of their offers to me, so I am conceding on issueB and keeping issueC/issueD/issueE closer to their apparent preferences while not accepting their very low-utility pattern.

At t=0.54 I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.52, conceding further on lower/medium-priority issues while still protecting my most important issueA. The opponent has held very firm around issueB/valueE and issueE/valueE, with little real concession, so I am moving closer on issueC/D/E but not fully matching their low-utility bids yet.

At t=0.56 I am targeting a moderate mid-game concession while still preserving my most important issue, issueA, at valueA. The opponent has shown little real concession and repeatedly offers valueE on issueB, issueD, and issueE, so I concede on those lower/medium-value areas while improving issueC slightly to avoid repeating my last bid and keep my utility acceptable.

I am targeting a moderate concession bid with weighted utility around 0.42, keeping some value on the most important issueA while conceding heavily on the lower-value pattern the opponent keeps demanding. At t=0.58 there is time pressure to move meaningfully, but not enough to accept their very low-utility offers; their bids show they are holding firm around issueB/valueE, issueD/valueE, issueE/valueE, and issueC/valueD or valueE, with no natural-language messages to alter that read.

At t=0.60 I am targeting a moderate concession around utility 0.38, since the opponent has remained very firm on issueB/valueE, issueD/valueE, issueE/valueE and alternates mostly between issueA valueD/valueE and issueC valueD/valueE. Time pressure now justifies moving closer to their pattern, but I still preserve some value on the most important issueA by offering valueB rather than their preferred valueD/valueE.

At t=0.62 I am targeting a moderate utility bid around 0.42, since there is still time but the opponent has remained very firm around low-utility offers for me. Their repeated bids strongly signal they care about issueB/issueD/issueE being valueE and alternate between issueC valueD/valueE, so I concede those lower-priority areas while holding issueA at valueB rather than dropping to their preferred valueD/valueE.

I am targeting a utility around 0.40, conceding further on lower-weight issues while still preserving some value on the important issueA. At t=0.64 the opponent has been very firm, repeatedly offering mostly valueE/valueD combinations, so I am moving closer to that pattern but avoiding simply accepting their low-utility bid yet.

At t=0.66 I am targeting a substantial concession bid around 0.42 utility for me, since the deadline is approaching but the opponent’s offers are still very low for my preferences. The opponent consistently signals interest in valueE on issueB/issueD/issueE and valueD or valueE on issueC, so I concede heavily there while holding issueA at valueB rather than dropping to their preferred low values on my most important issue. There are no opponent messages to factor in.

At t=0.68 I am targeting a moderate utility around 0.38, preserving some value on my most important issueA while conceding heavily on the other issues. The opponent has held very firm around valueD/valueE patterns and has not meaningfully improved offers to me, so I am making a near-compatible bid but not yet accepting their exact low-utility proposal before the deadline.

At t=0.70 I am making a substantial but not final concession, targeting a utility around 0.42 by holding some value on high-importance issueA and issueC while conceding issueB, issueD, and issueE to values the opponent repeatedly proposes. The opponent has been mostly firm around valueE/valueD combinations, with little evidence of meaningful concession, so I am choosing a bid close to their pattern without dropping all the way to their low-utility offer.

At t=0.72, time pressure is significant, so I am targeting a bid the opponent has repeatedly signaled rather than continuing to hold out. Their offers consistently demand issueB=valueE and issueE=valueE, with limited movement only between issueA valueD/valueE and issueC valueD/valueE; I choose the best previously signaled pattern for my utility, especially keeping issueC at valueD.
